verbatim_text: There is no relevant data. We might even have an open research problem. And I talked about my original idea of how to generate data using social provision and how to discover state-of-the-art solutions for scientific problems. What I did not get a chance to talk about was what I did between all these seven years. I worked a lot on robotics in manipulation, locomotion, and video segmentation, which is a primitive for robotics. And even more importantly, the hundreds, not thousands, of direct follow-ups from other people. Just to give you two examples. In serum proving, alpha proof, that was the first model to get an IMO model. And it said in the paper that for P performance, on the most important problems, test time training is crucial. And the same goes for the leading mass proving system today called Aristotel from Harmonic. These are just about all the open documents we have on how the leading mass proving systems work. And really, going back to this slide, there are many methods under the concept of test time training. And most would attribute my paper in 2019 for bringing this concept to deep learning. And this I consider my most important contribution.
